document has been compiled by the EECS Instructional Support Group (ISG) as an introduction to the UNIX operating system and the EECS Instructional Facilities. Because resources change periodically, the manual is also evolving and will continue to

, the manual is also evolving and will continue to be revised. We have attempted to ensure that the information is accurate, but errors can slip through. We would be delighted if you would help us improve this document by reporting any errors or inc

prove this document by reporting any errors or inconsistencies that you find to the EECS Instructional Group, 386 Cory Hall or send e-mail to errors@cory . Parts of this document have been adapted, with permission, from documents produced by the Iow
